title: Containers への SSH、もう設定いらずでつなげるよ！
summary: Cloudflare Containers への Wrangler 経由の SSH 接続が、デフォルトで有効になったよ。公開鍵を登録すればすぐつなげて、いらなければ設定でオフにもできるの。
title_en: SSH into Cloudflare Containers, now with zero setup!
summary_en: SSH into Cloudflare Containers through Wrangler is now on by default. Add a public key to connect right away, or turn it off in your config if you don't need it.
